revision.comment: Created page with "#redirect[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]"
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Authority control]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]
#redirect[[en:Help:Authority control]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:dd]]

revision.comment: starting the process of moving the first thousand into a different category since I think my bulk operations are limited to 1000
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Authority control]][[[[Category:pp]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[[[Category:pp]][[Category:dd]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Authority control]][[[[Category:pp]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[[[Category:pp]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 2]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Authority control]][[[[Category:pp]][[[[Category:pp]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 2]]

revision.comment: confirming the redirects
revision.text: #redirect[[Authority control]][[category:confirmed wikipedia redirects]][[en:Help:Authority control]][[[[Category:pp]][[[[Category:pp]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 2]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing the redirects]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[Authority control]][[category:confirmed wikipedia redirects]][[en:Help:Authority control]][[[[Category:pp]][[[[Category:pp]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 2]] [[Category:refreshing the redirects]]

revision.comment: moving to lower subcategory so I can mass edit them again
revision.text: #redirect[[Authority control]][[category:confirmed wikipedia redirects 1]][[en:Help:Authority control]][[[[Category:pp]][[[[Category:pp]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 1 2]] [[Category:refreshing the redirects]]

revision.comment: moving to the second subcategory
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Authority control]][[category:confirmed wikipedia redirects 2 1]][[en:Help:Authority control]][[[[Category:pp]][[[[Category:pp]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 2 1 2]] [[Category:refreshing the redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bumping for the second subcategory]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Authority control]][[category:confirmed wikipedia redirects 2 1]][[en:Help:Authority control]][[[[Category:pp]][[[[Category:pp]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 2 1 2]] [[Category:refreshing the redirects]] [[Category:bumping for the second subcategory]]

revision.comment: fixing error I did on all these pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Authority control]][[category:confirmed wikipedia redirects 2 1]][[en:Help:Authority control]][[[[Category:pp]][[[[Category:pp]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 2 1 2]] [[Category:refreshing the redirects]] [[Category:bumping for the second subcategory]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Help:Authority control
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Authority control]] [[en:Help:Authority control]]

revision.comment: removing these dumb broken links that cause problems
revision.text: redirect[[:en:Authority control]] [[en:Help:Authority control]]

revision.comment: Bot: consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25397554627|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: redirect[[:en:Authority control]] {{wikidata link||en|Help:Authority control}}
